programme.title: Drive Tv
programme.desc: (G) Jess Lydka-Morris embarks on a scenic adventure to Jervis Bay, NSW, behind the wheel of the all-new Kia Carnival Hybrid. She seeks out hidden gems and off-the-beaten-track roads.

programme.title: Drive Tv
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.

programme.title: Drive Tv: Vehicle Insights
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.

programme.title: Drive Tv
programme.desc: (G) Emma takes us to Hanging Rock and beyond in the KGM Ssangyong Torres, visiting Lavandula Swiss Italian Farm and Kryal Castle while highlighting the features of this dynamic SUV.

programme.title: Drive Tv
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.
